Interface SubscriptionContext

public interface SubscriptionContext
Represents the set of enabled subscriptions for a user or guild.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<Long>
    enabledSubscriptions()
    Returns the set of enabled subscription IDs.
    default AccessCheckResult
    hasAccess(Feature<?,?> feature)
    Checks if the given feature is accessible with the current subscriptions.
    default boolean
    isEmpty()
    Returns whether the context has no enabled subscriptions.
    default SubscriptionContext
    merge(SubscriptionContext other)
    Merges this context with another one.

  • Method Details

    • enabledSubscriptions

      Set<Long> enabledSubscriptions()
      Returns the set of enabled subscription IDs.
      Returns:
      The set of enabled subscription IDs.

    • merge

      default SubscriptionContext merge(SubscriptionContext other)
      Merges this context with another one.
      Parameters:
      other - The context to merge with.
      Returns:
      A new context containing the merged subscriptions.

    • hasAccess

      default AccessCheckResult hasAccess(Feature<?,?> feature)
      Checks if the given feature is accessible with the current subscriptions.
      Parameters:
      feature - The feature.
      Returns:
      The result of the access check.

    • isEmpty

      default boolean isEmpty()
      Returns whether the context has no enabled subscriptions.
      Returns:
      true if no subscriptions are enabled.
